title: Qa Villager Extends & Waste innovations
description: This mod enriches Minecraft with new villager professions, practical work blocks, optimized resource recycling, Qa rosegold, and more.
body:
Welcome to the "Qa Villager Extends & Waste Innovations" mod! This mod brings a wealth of new content to your Minecraft world, expanding the depth of the villager system and revolutionizing resource utilization mechanics in the game.
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d5b18742e799bf5b04cf28f1046f9fbdb050b6_0.webp)

In terms of villager extensions, the mod adds 5 brand-new villager professions, each with a corresponding work block that also has practical functions:

   **Qa Netherite Crafting Table**:
   Not only a workplace for the new profession, but also capable of crafting many special items that cannot be synthesized in the vanilla game;
   
   **Qa Netherite Barrel for Trading and its variant Qa Netherite Barrel**:
   Boasting an 217-slot storage capacity and excellent explosion resistance, they are ideal for item storage;
   
   **Qa Marine Core**:
   When placed, it continuously damages nearby hostile mobs and applies Conduit Power to other creatures (including players); when activated by redstone, its damage and effective range are further enhanced; when held, it also provides Conduit Power to the holder;
   
   **Qa Sawmill**:
   A powerful tool for efficiently processing logs - breaking down logs (including bamboo planks) with it yields 50% more planks than breaking them down in the inventory or crafting table; however, be cautious: walking on the sawmill will cause damage!
   ![By using Qa sawmill, you can get 50% more planks than normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcef7ef0bee09b49b1cca11851a320a1c2c551f1_0.webp)
   **Qa Furnace for Recycling**:
   Serves as both a work block for the new profession and the core prop of the waste innovation system.

The waste innovation system focuses on solving the pain points of resource utilization in the vanilla game:

   **4 waste stones innovations**:
   For the "4 waste stones" (granite, andesite, diorite, tuff) that are abundant in mining but have limited uses, the mod expands their crafting recipes - they can now replace vanilla "cobblestone" in most syntheses, such as making stone tools, furnaces, and redstone blocks like pistons;
   
   **Optimized equipment recycling mechanics**:
   The vanilla furnace only yields 1 corresponding mineral grain when recycling equipment, which is extremely inefficient - making most players reluctant to recycle this excess equipment, even if it is discarded. The Qa Furnace for Recycling enables efficient material recovery, producing twice the number of mineral fragments corresponding to the ingots or diamonds used in crafting the equipment (e.g., a diamond chestplate can be recycled into 16 diamond pieces, and an iron pickaxe into 6 iron nuggets); saddles, shears, and chainmail armor can also be recycled through it. Additionally, the mod adds "Diamond Pieces", and 9 diamond pieces can be crafted into 1 complete diamond.
   ![Equipments are more recyclable by using Qa furnace for recycling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aa4593844f4442eded983ab9a304e104cf04f94_0.webp)

Other new contents:

   **New material Qa Rosegold**: Can be synthesized in the Qa Netherite Crafting Table using copper ingots and netherite ingots. Its corresponding ore generates in the End, and mining it drops Qa Rosegold Nuggets;
   
   **Qa Rosegold Series Equipment**: Including a full set of armor and tools, upgraded from netherite equipment in the smithing table using the "Qa Rosegold Upgrade Template" and Qa Rosegold for forging;
   
   **Qa Bedrock Breaker**: Upgraded from the Qa Rosegold Pickaxe, it can break any block with a right-click - use it with extreme caution!
   
   **Now, furnaces can directly smelt raw ore blocks (such as raw iron blocks)**.
   
  
More hidden contents are waiting for you to discover in your exploration!
